overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a misty mountain lake environment. The character approaches a wooden dock, passes a saddled horse, and begins fishing in the calm water surrounded by rocky peaks and pine forests.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside meadow approaching misty mountain lake

agents.ego_description: walking steadily downhill through tall grass toward the misty lakeshore with mountains in the distance

entered.detail: dense evergreen trees lining the left side of the meadow
tall rocky peaks with mist rising from the valley
calm water surface with morning mist hovering above
large gray boulder formation near the water's edge
tall green grass covering the sloping terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open grassy meadow with dense pine forests on the left and a large rock outcrop on the right. In the distance, misty mountains rise above a calm lake, with morning light filtering through the partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded lakeshore with wooden dock and horse

events.description: saddled horse comes into view standing near the shoreline under trees
character steps from dirt shore onto wooden dock extending into the lake

agents.ego_description: walking past the saddled horse and onto the wooden dock extending into the water

notable_agents.action: saddled horse standing still near the water's edge, facing the lake

entered.detail: dark horse with saddle and bags standing by the shore
weathered wooden pier extending into the calm lake water
small wooden structure partially visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the terrain transitions from grass to dirt near the shore. A saddled horse stands by the water's edge on the right. The character steps onto a wooden dock and walks toward the end, with the misty lake stretching ahead and mountains visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of wooden fishing dock on mountain lake

events.description: character stops walking and turns to face the open water
character equips fishing rod and casts line into the lake

agents.ego_description: standing at the end of the dock casting a fishing line into the calm mountain lake

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the dock and turns to face the open water. After a brief pause, the character pulls out a fishing rod and casts the line into the misty lake. The view shows the calm water stretching toward the rocky mountains, with pine trees visible on the left shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide mountain meadow toward the edge of a misty lake. It begins with the character walking through an open grassy expanse flanked by dense pine forests and a large rock outcrop, with morning light filtering through a partly cloudy sky. As the character advances, the terrain transitions from grass to dirt near the shore, passing a saddled horse before the camera follows the character onto a wooden dock. The scene then shifts focus toward the open water as the character reaches the end of the pier and turns to face the horizon. Finally, the character casts a fishing rod into the calm lake, with the view expanding to show the water stretching toward distant rocky mountains and the pine-lined shore.
